site.title: Hope:Re
site.description: Hope:Re - An effective and compact tool for preventing the theft of artistic intellectual property

hero.description: A small friend of the artistic souls

about.heading: What is Hope?
about.description1: Hope:Re is an open-source tool that shields your artwork from unauthorized AI training and style mimicry.
about.description2: It applies invisible adversarial perturbations to your images, making them resistant to generative AI systems that attempt to learn or reproduce your unique style without consent.

demo.heading: How does it work?
demo.description: Hope:Re integrates algorithms from The Glaze Project (University of Chicago) — including Glaze, Nightshade, and Noise — to generate an invisible adversarial perturbation layer over your artwork, effectively neutralizing img2img reproduction across most generative AI models.
